title: delphinium azureum var. simplex
intro: Delphinium azureum var. simplex, also known as azure delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium azureum var. simplex are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the dried flowers in hot water or using it as a tincture, although it's essential to use caution when consuming it due to its potential toxicity.
